conversation.primary_task: v1.0.x release cycle — bug fixes and CI stabilization
conversation.summary: Released v1.0.0, v1.0.1, v1.0.2. Fixed issues #66 (--log flag), #67 (single-repo coverage warning), #68 (phantom dev/unresolved identity), #69 (WoW baseline drift), #70 (timezone ISO week assignment). All CI/CD green, all issues closed, release binaries published for 4 platforms. CD pipeline now idempotent. CI/CD monitoring added to INSTRUCTIONS.md.
accomplishments: v1.0.0 released — feature-complete Rust port, 247 tests, all docs updated
v1.0.1 released — CI fixes (clippy unnecessary_sort_by x8, collapsible_match x2, rustdoc x8), hermetic identity resolver test, switched to rustls/vendored-libgit2, full docs audit
v1.0.2 released — timezone-aware ISO week fix (#70), inclusive until_date, CD idempotent publish
Issues #66, #67, #68, #69, #70 all closed with resolution comments
CD auto-bump step removed — versions now managed manually

recent_commits: 6e3d9e2 chore: bump to v1.0.2, fix CD idempotent publish check
